channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: BARMM Leaders Rally Behind Stronger Coordination Between National Government and Regional Authorities
item.description: In Cotabato City, top officials from the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) have shown strong support for better collaboration between the national government and local stakeholde...

item.title: Nine killed, 23 injured as monsoon rains trigger flash floods and damage homes across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
item.description: At least nine people lost their lives and 23 others sustained injuries in different rain-related incidents across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) during the past 48 hours, as the first spell of monsoon rains ...

item.title: Record ocean temperatures in June linked to developing El Niño and accelerating global warming
item.description: The world’s oceans have reached their highest recorded temperatures for June, surpassing previous peaks seen during the 2023–24 El Niño period. Average sea surface temperatures are now just under 21°C...

item.title: Former Downing Street aide says Labour was unprepared for government after 2024 election win
item.description: Morgan McSweeney, Sir Keir Starmer’s former chief of staff and key strategist behind Labour’s 2024 general election victory, has acknowledged that the party was not adequately prepared for governing a...

item.title: Passenger arrested on Mombasa-Nairobi highway with heroin worth Sh1 million in anti-narcotics operation
item.description: Kenyan anti-narcotics detectives have intercepted a suspected drug trafficker during a routine inspection on a Nairobi-bound passenger bus, recovering 300 grammes of heroin valued at approximately Sh1...

item.title: 16-year-old boy suffers potentially life-threatening gunshot wounds in Birmingham shooting
item.description: A 16-year-old boy was left with potentially life-threatening gunshot wounds following a shooting incident in Birmingham on Wednesday evening. Police were called to reports of shots fired on Bowyer Roa...

item.title: MS NOW panel critiques weaker-than-expected U.S. jobs report under Trump administration
item.description: A segment on MS NOW highlighted concerns over a newly released U.S. jobs report that showed significantly weaker-than-expected employment growth. According to reporting discussed on the program, the e...

item.title: Bruce Foxton of The Jam Announces Parkinson’s Diagnosis and Plans to Continue Performing
item.description: Bruce Foxton, the bassist and co-founding member of the iconic British band The Jam, has publicly revealed his recent diagnosis with Parkinson’s disease. The 70-year-old musician shared the news via s...

item.title: Gary Glitter charged with historic sexual offences dating back to the late 1970s
item.description: Former glam rock star Gary Glitter, whose real name is Paul Gadd, has been charged with four historic sexual offences relating to allegations dating back several decades. According to the Crown Prosec...

item.title: Parallex Bank gives N1 million each to Lagos youth athletes after National Youth Games victory
item.description: Parallex Bank has rewarded ten young athletes from Team Lagos with N1 million each following their outstanding performance at the 2025 National Youth Games, where Lagos emerged overall champions for t...

item.title: Markwayne Mullin criticized for remarks on Iran’s World Cup exit amid diplomatic tensions
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin faced criticism after publicly celebrating the elimination of Iran’s national soccer team from the 2026 World Cup. His remarks, in which he expressed satis...

item.title: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif to attend Iran funeral and visit Türkiye during official foreign tour
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif is scheduled to travel to Tehran to attend the funeral prayers of the late Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, according to the Foreign O...

item.title: Supreme Court limits liability in Roundup cases, raising tensions within MAHA movement
item.description: A recent U.S. Supreme Court decision has blocked certain lawsuits against Bayer-Monsanto over its Roundup herbicide, a ruling that could significantly affect ongoing and future litigation tied to alle...

item.title: The Value of Peer Communities in Developing Better Entrepreneur Leaders
item.description: This opinion article emphasizes the often overlooked aspect of entrepreneurship: the need for a strong support community. While society celebrates entrepreneurs for their resilience and business-build...

item.title: Nigerian Student Delivers Flawless Mandarin Speech at Graduation in China
item.description: Nigerian graduate Nnabuike Chisom don make Nigerians proud as him deliver one flawless keynote speech entirely for Mandarin during im master's graduation ceremony at Zhongnan University of Economics a...

item.title: US Actions in Horn of Africa Raise Questions on Sudan Policy Under Trump
item.description: The Donald Trump administration has taken several steps that worry many people about the United States strategy in Sudan and the Horn of Africa. Although the US claims it wants to act as an honest bro...

item.title: House Democrats investigate alleged misuse of America250 celebration funding and governance
item.description: House Democrats have launched scrutiny into allegations surrounding the organization of America’s upcoming 250th Independence Day celebration, claiming that the White House attempted to exert undue po...

item.title: Concerns Raised Over AI-Generated Influencers Promoting New Gay Dating App Goose
item.description: A recent WIRED report examines controversy surrounding Goose, an invite-only dating and social app aimed at gay men that markets itself as an alternative to hookup-focused platforms like Grindr. The a...

item.title: NBC boosts investment in Tanzanian football with expanded youth and player development programmes
item.description: The National Bank of Commerce (NBC) has confirmed its continued and expanded commitment to developing football in Tanzania through its sponsorship of the NBC Premier League. The bank announced new ini...

item.title: US-Iran conflict disrupts LNG supply chain while Shell projects long-term global demand growth
item.description: The report explains how tensions from the US-Iran war have seriously disrupted global liquefied natural gas (LNG) trade, creating shocks across energy markets and shipping routes. According to Shell’s...
